title: heuchera micrantha var. diversifolia
intro: Heuchera micrantha var. diversifolia, also known as Alabamum or Silver Maple Heuchera, is a type of perennial plant native to the southeastern United States, characterized by its maple-like leaves with lobed or deeply cut margins. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use as a purgative and diuretic, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin issues. The health benefits of Heuchera micrantha var. diversifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as prevent the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. Heuchera micrantha var. diversifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although caution should be exercised when consuming the plant due to its potential toxicity.
